title: Y2K Preparedness Checklist
text:
## Y2K Readiness Plan

**Stockpile:**
- {number} gallons of {food}
- {adjective} batteries

**Finances:** Withdraw {number} dollars in {adjective} bills from the bank.

**Equipment:** Test the {adjective} generator and the {adjective} radio.

**Maps:** Print maps because GPS may {verb}.

**Grandma:** Teach her to {verb} without fear.

**Supplies:** Store canned {food} and one {object} for morale.

**Midnight rule:** Do not {verb} near any {adjective} computer.

**Worst case:** Build a {adjective} fort and assign {person} to guard duty.
